app.tagline: Neighborhood platform for mutual aid and local life

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

modal.hint: The frontend is now connected to the local development API.

services.pageSubtitle: Offer or request a service from your neighbors
services.emptyAll: No listings yet. Be the first to post one!
services.emptyPosted: You haven't posted any listings yet.
services.emptyAccepted: You haven't accepted any services yet.

events.pageSubtitle: Meet your neighbors at local activities
events.empty: No upcoming events. Be the first to organize one!

actions.confirmCancel: Cancel this event? This action cannot be undone.

modal.title: Create an event
modal.locationPlaceholder: e.g. Place de la République, 75011 Paris

home.title: The local network that brings residents of the same district closer together.
home.description: BobConnect brings mutual aid, messaging, events and digital signatures into a modern, reassuring and easy to use experience.

neighbors.label: one connected community around a shared space

events.label: visibility into local life and neighborhood needs

home.highlightsTitle: A platform designed for neighborhood life
home.highlightsDescription: Each module strengthens proximity between residents while providing a reliable frame to collaborate, share and organize local life.

services.title: Useful neighborhood help and listings
services.description: Publishing help requests, offering a service or finding an available neighbor becomes natural with a clear view of local needs.

documents.title: Smooth digital signatures
documents.description: Contracts and PDF documents move through a clear workspace with signature fields, tracking and MFA verification for sensitive actions.

events.title: Visible and engaging local life
events.description: Workshops, collections, meetings and district activities are presented in an interface that encourages participation and recommendations.

messaging.title: Direct and secure conversations
messaging.description: Messages, photos, online presence and private exchanges strengthen local connections without leaving the platform.

home.journeyTitle: A clear experience from first access to action
home.journeyDescription: The homepage immediately provides the right landmarks: join the district, connect with others and take action without friction.

join.title: Join your district
join.description: A simple entry point to sign up, verify your address and quickly understand what the platform brings.

connect.title: Find the right interactions
connect.description: Residents can quickly spot events, services, documents or discussions that matter to them.

contribute.title: Participate with confidence
contribute.description: Every interaction is designed to stay clear, reassuring and engaging, even before the API is connected.

home.communityTitle: The BobConnect concept in three promises
home.communityDescription: Beyond a simple portal, BobConnect aims to become a digital meeting point for trust, coordination and local participation.

trust.title: Digital trust
trust.description: Stronger authentication, signed documents and clear flows provide a credible framework for resident interactions.

local.title: Concrete district impact
local.description: Services, votes, events and messaging bring essential neighborhood uses together inside a single guiding interface.

inclusion.title: Accessible experience
inclusion.description: A modern and readable interface can welcome residents, moderators and administrators alike.

footer.title: BobConnect gives neighborhood life an elegant and useful digital presence.
footer.description: This first homepage version establishes the visual universe, product story and entry points for the next modules.

sections.platformDescription: A single access point for mutual aid, documents, messaging, events and local civic participation.
sections.trustDescription: The frontend already prepares login flows, user states and future authentication journeys.
sections.futureDescription: The current structure makes it easy to add the final hero, internal pages, API and business integrations next.

errors.notFoundDescription: The requested route does not exist yet in the BobConnect frontend.
